faqs.question: What pests are most common in Woodlawn, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Woodlawn residents most frequently deal with cockroaches, mice, rats, ants, and bed bugs. The neighborhood's older housing stock and proximity to Van Cortlandt Park can attract rodents and insects, especially during colder months. Our general pest control service addresses all common household pests with comprehensive treatment plans.
